characters.appearance: Mid-30s, medium build, fair complexion. Dark hair pulled back into a simple style. She has a round face with soft features and wears a small bindi.
characters.wardrobe: Maroon salwar kameez with gold patterns, paired with a green and orange dupatta. She wears a mangalsutra and bangles.
characters.demeanor: Earnest, relatable, and confident, speaking directly to the viewer while multitasking.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: किस्मत में तो बस एक हाउसवाइफ बनना ही लिखा था, पर मैंने अपनी कहानी खुद बदल दी। [It was written in my destiny to just be a housewife, but I changed my own story.]
Character A says: रात को बच्चों को सुला के, किचन समेट कर, मैं फाइनली टीवी देखने बैठती थी। [At night after putting the kids to sleep and clearing the kitchen, I would finally sit to watch TV.]
Character A says: दिन भर घर का काम, सबकी जिम्मेदारी। पर अपनी खुद की पहचान? ये सोच कर बहुत टेंशन होती थी। [All day household chores, everyone's responsibility. But my own identity? Thinking about this gave me a lot of tension.]
Character A says: एक दिन सोचा, ऐसे कब तक चलेगा? तब मेरी सहेली ने मुझे Supernova ऐप के बारे में बताया। [One day I thought, how long will this go on? Then my friend told me about the Supernova app.]
Character A says: सच बताऊं तो मुझे इंग्लिश बोलने से बहुत डर लगता था। स्कूल में अच्छी थी, पर सालों घर में रहकर सब भूल गई। [To tell you the truth, I was very scared of speaking English. I was good in school, but staying at home for years, I forgot everything.]
Character A says: पति की ऑफिस पार्टी में सब इंग्लिश में बात करते, मैं बस 'हां-हां' करती रहती। [At my husband's office party everyone spoke in English, I would just keep saying 'yes-yes'.]
Character A says: बेटी की PTM में टीचर इंग्लिश में बोलती, मैं चुपचाप सुनती रहती। [At my daughter's PTM the teacher spoke in English, I would just listen quietly.]
Character A says: अपने ही बच्चे का होमवर्क नहीं करवा पाती थी। फिर मैंने Supernova पर रोज़ प्रैक्टिस शुरू की। [I couldn't even help my own child with homework. Then I started practicing daily on Supernova.]
Character A says: इसमें हिंदी से इंग्लिश सीखना इतना आसान है। रोज़ के lessons और real-life situations जैसे PTM या शॉपिंग के लिए प्रैक्टिस। [Learning English from Hindi is so easy here. Daily lessons and practice for real-life situations like PTM or shopping.]
Character A says: और इनका AI ट्यूटर तो कमाल है! रात को फ्री होकर मैं उसी के साथ बोलकर प्रैक्टिस करती हूँ। [And their AI tutor is amazing! At night when I'm free, I practice speaking with it.]
Character A says: जितनी बार भी गलती करूँ, वो बिना जज किए सुधारता है। बिल्कुल एक बड़े भाई की तरह सपोर्ट करता है। [No matter how many times I make a mistake, it corrects me without judging. Supports me exactly like an older brother.]
Character A says: पहली बार मैंने पूरे confidence के साथ बोला, "I am Pooja, and I want to restart my career." [For the first time I spoke with full confidence, "I am Pooja, and I want to restart my career."]
Character A says: घर के काम के साथ-साथ मेरी इंग्लिश भी सुधरने लगी। अब रोज़ रात को मेरा Supernova टाइम होता है। [Along with household chores, my English also started improving. Now every night is my Supernova time.]
Character A says: कुछ ही महीनों में मुझे एक अच्छी वर्क-फ्रॉम-होम जॉब भी मिल गई। [In just a few months, I also got a good work-from-home job.]
Character A says: घर भी संभालती हूँ, और अपने पैसे भी कमाती हूँ। [I manage the house too, and earn my own money.]
Character A says: पर सबसे बड़ी खुशी ये है कि बेटी का होमवर्क अब मैं खुद करवाती हूँ। [But the biggest happiness is that I help my daughter with her homework myself now.]
Character A says: PTM में जाकर टीचर से कॉन्फिडेंस के साथ इंग्लिश में बात करती हूँ। बेटी मुझे देखकर बहुत खुश होती है। [I go to the PTM and talk to the teacher in English with confidence. My daughter gets very happy seeing me.]
Character A says: पति ने कहा, "तुम तो बिल्कुल बदल गई हो।" [My husband said, "You have completely changed."]
Character A says: मैंने कहा, "हाँ, क्योंकि इस बार मैंने खुद को खुद बनाया है।" [I said, "Yes, because this time I have made myself."]
Character A says: अगर आप भी अपनी पहचान बनाना चाहती हैं, तो आज ही शुरुआत करें। [If you also want to create your identity, start today.]
Character A says: Supernova ऐप डाउनलोड करें और अपनी इंग्लिश बोलने की जर्नी शुरू करें। [Download the Supernova app and begin your English speaking journey.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable pain point of a housewife feeling she has lost her identity and confidence.
- Introduces the app as a practical, non-judgmental solution that fits into a busy daily routine.
- Highlights the emotional payoff: gaining confidence, helping the child with homework, and earning respect from family.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Kismat mein toh bas ek housewife banna hi likha tha (It was written in my destiny to just be a housewife)
Par maine apni kahani khud badal di (But I changed my own story)
Raat ko bachchon ko sula ke (At night after putting the kids to sleep)
Kitchen samet kar (Clearing the kitchen)
Main finally TV dekhne baithti thi (I would finally sit to watch TV)
Din bhar ghar ka kaam (All day household chores)
Sabki zimmedari (Everyone's responsibility)
Par apni khud ki pehchaan? (But my own identity?)
Ye soch kar bahut tension hoti thi (Thinking about this gave me a lot of tension)
Ek din socha, aise kab tak chalega? (One day I thought, how long will this go on?)
Tab meri saheli ne mujhe Supernova app ke baare mein bataya (Then my friend told me about the Supernova app)
Sach bataun toh mujhe English bolne se bahut darr lagta tha (Honestly, I was very scared of speaking English)
School mein achhi thi, par saalon ghar mein rehkar sab bhool gayi (I was good in school, but staying at home for years, I forgot everything)
Pati ki office party mein sab English mein baat karte (At husband's office party everyone spoke in English)
Main bas haan-haan karti rehti (I just kept saying yes-yes)
Beti ki PTM mein teacher English mein bolti (At daughter's PTM teacher spoke in English)
Main chupchaap sunti rehti (I would just listen quietly)
Apne hi bachche ka homework nahi karwa paati thi (Couldn't even help my own child with homework)
Phir maine Supernova par roz practice shuru ki (Then I started practicing daily on Supernova)
Ismein Hindi se English seekhna itna aasaan hai (Learning English from Hindi is so easy here)
Roz ke lessons aur real-life situations ke liye practice (Daily lessons and practice for real-life situations)
Aur inka AI tutor toh kamaal hai! (And their AI tutor is amazing!)
Raat ko free hokar main usike saath bolkar practice karti hoon (At night when free, I practice speaking with it)
Jitni baar bhi galti karoon (No matter how many times I make a mistake)
Wo bina judge kiye sudhaarta hai (It corrects without judging)
Bilkul ek bade bhai ki tarah support karta hai (Supports exactly like an older brother)
Pehli baar maine poore confidence ke saath bola (For the first time I spoke with full confidence)
I am Pooja, and I want to restart my career
Ghar ke kaam ke saath-saath meri English bhi sudharne lagi (Along with household chores, my English also started improving)
Ab roz raat ko mera Supernova time hota hai (Now every night is my Supernova time)
Kuch hi mahinon mein mujhe ek achhi work-from-home job bhi mil gayi (In just a few months, I also got a good work-from-home job)
Ghar bhi sambhalti hoon, aur apne paise bhi kamati hoon (I manage the house too, and earn my own money)
Par sabse badi khushi ye hai (But the biggest happiness is)
Beti ka homework ab main khud karwati hoon (I help my daughter with her homework myself now)
PTM mein jaakar teacher se confidence ke saath English mein baat karti hoon (I go to PTM and talk to the teacher in English with confidence)
Beti mujhe dekhkar bahut khush hoti hai (My daughter gets very happy seeing me)
Pati ne kaha, tum toh bilkul badal gayi ho (Husband said, you have completely changed)
Maine kaha, haan, kyunki is baar maine khud ko khud banaya hai (I said, yes, because this time I made myself)
Agar aap bhi apni pehchaan banana chahti hain (If you also want to create your identity)
Toh aaj hi shuruwat karein (Then start today)
Supernova app download karein (Download Supernova app)

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: तो अभी इंस्टॉल बटन पर क्लिक करें और Supernova ऐप डाउनलोड करें। [So click on the install button now and download the Supernova app.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a clear, direct Call to Action.
- Reinforces the brand name visually and audibly.

- Provides necessary legal and educational disclaimers.
- Sets expectations regarding app results.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Supernova kisi bhi government authority institution brand, organisation ya individual ke dwara endorsed, sponsored, affiliated ya associated nahi hai. Kisi bhi names trademarks logos ya references ka use sirf educational aur informational purposes ke liye kiya gaya hai Kuch content sirf samjhane ke liye dramatised ya representational ho sakta hai Supernova kisi bhi guaranteed results ka promise nahi karta Outcomes individual effort aur doosre factors par depend karte hain aur vary kar sakte hain.
